listening_services.review_note: Confirm service owner and exposure requirement.

findings.title: SSH password authentication requires review
findings.description: The sample SSH configuration allows password authentication.
findings.technical_details: The fictional audit found PasswordAuthentication set to yes.
findings.business_impact: Remote access posture can increase exposure if authentication controls are weak.
findings.recommendation: Confirm key-based access and disable SSH password authentication after approval.

findings.title: Unexpected listening service requires owner validation
findings.description: A sample application service is listening on all interfaces.
findings.technical_details: TCP 8080 appears in the fictional listening service inventory.
findings.business_impact: Unreviewed services can expand exposed attack surface.
findings.recommendation: Confirm the service owner and restrict binding or firewall access if not required.
